error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the M5 Web Booking endpoint.

user.title: M5 Web Booking
user.description: Enter the endpoint for the M5 Web Booking instance. You can use either the host (for example http://11.222.33.40) or the full path (for example http://11.222.33.40/M5WebBokning).
